Careers
DOCTOR OF CHIROPRACTIC – ASSOCIATE

We are seeking a Doctor of Chiropractic for our Christian, family wellness, subluxation based, corrective care Chiropractic office, located on the east side of Ottawa in Orléans, Ontario. I have cared for many people in the past 25 years, with a focus on spinal correction using the latest rehabilitation techniques. Through the pandemic to present day, I continue to have high new patient numbers. I am equipped with digital x-ray and PostureRay digitizing software to track structural change. If you want to learn how to correct the structure of the spine and impact the health of people, this is a great opportunity. I am ready to mentor a chiropractor who is willing to learn and grow.

Candidates must have a Doctor of Chiropractic degree.
Candidates must be registered with the College of Chiropractors of Ontario.
Candidates must be legally permitted to work in Canada.
French is an asset in our bilingual community, but not required.

DOCTOR OF CHIROPRACTIC – INDEPENDENT CHIROPRACTOR

I am seeking a Chiropractor who wants to create their dream practice as an independent contractor, leasing my office on my off days. This high tech, beautifully equipped Chiropractic office, is located in Orléans (Ottawa), Ontario. I practice Monday, Tuesday, and Thursdays. The office is available on Wednesday, Friday to Sunday.
